sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 21

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 21:1
items.html: (to the question) There is a connection between the upper one and the lower one from the discernment of the lower one's Rucha Kadma'a [first spirit], which is present in the upper-upper and in the upper one, in the secret of the first MAN [Mayin Nukvin] that are never missing from there. And from the discernment of this Rucha Kadma'a, the lower one and the upper one are regarded as brothers to one another, and they are counted as equal degrees; hence the lower one can rise to that Rucha of his, which he left in the upper one, at any hour he wishes, for it is regarded as his own degree. (Inner Observation, Item 17)
